basics.title: Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: Full-Stack Developer (MERN) with 3+ years UAE experience architecting high-performance enterprise systems. Reduced latency by 30% via optimized data architectures and accelerated deployments by 40% through CI/CD automation. Delivered production-ready solutions with 99.9% reliability and seamless third-party integrations.

bullets: Built Node.js/Nest.js backends, reducing latency by 25% through event-driven architectures.
Accelerated React/Next.js performance by 30% through SSR and modular TypeScript architectures.
Optimized Flutter app performance by 25% using Provider and streamlined async data architectures.
Architected Redis caching, cutting PostgreSQL/MongoDB latency by 30% and reducing database load.
Integrated Stripe, GraphQL, and WebSockets, improving real-time data and payment workflows by 20%.
Automated AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes pipelines via Jenkins, cutting deployment time by 40%.
Developed Node.js/Nest.js backends, improving API response times and data security by 20%.
Implemented React/Next.js components, boosting development speed by 20% via reusable UI libraries.
Boosted PostgreSQL and MongoDB speeds by 20% via indexing and schema optimization.
Streamlined CI/CD pipelines, cutting deployment time by 20% via automated build/preview environments.

projects.name: E-Commerce
bullets: Scaled to 10k+ users and boosted conversion by 15% via AI-driven multi-currency checkout.

projects.name: Digital POS
bullets: Built a VAT-compliant, offline-first system with 99.9% sync accuracy and zero data loss.
